instructions.name: cancel_obligation
docs: Method must be called by both participants of obligation.
Each will interact only with his 'cancel flag'.
When both flags are true - only then obligation is considered as 'Canceled'.

instructions.name: confirm_obligation
docs: Method to get configrmation by 'from participant' (the one that will have to pay obligation).

instructions.name: create_new_pool
docs: Method that would be called when all the extisting pools are full.
This method would be called by last participant,
He will see a choice to pay for new pool, or wait till some pool is free
Only after his confirmation to pay for pool this method is invoked

instructions.name: create_pool_manager
docs: Method to create pool manager(dispatcher)

instructions.name: decline_obligation
docs: Method to decline obligation if 'from participant' disagree with conditions

instructions.name: init_escrow
docs: Method to init escrow account
Must be invoked by admin

instructions.name: pay_fee
docs: Method to pay fee of the session

instructions.name: register_obligation
docs: Method to create new obligation(from-to-amount)

instructions.name: register_participant
docs: Method to register new participant

instructions.name: update_fee_rate
docs: Method to update fee rate,
must be invoked by admin

instructions.name: update_user_type
docs: Method to change user's type
Can only be invoked by admin

instructions.name: withdraw_fee
docs: Method to Withdraw fee, can be invoked only by owner of escrow account(admin)

types.name: ClearingSession
docs: Object of session, maily used for statistics

types.name: ClearingState
docs: Account for general state of system

types.name: Escrow
docs: Account for getting commissions from users of system
Only admin can create this account (he is the owner)

types.name: NameRegistry
docs: Account for saving users' names,
uses can occupy name, so next will see it is used

types.name: Obligation
docs: Obligation from participant A to participant B
After creation it will be sticked to Pool X
session_id is 0 by default, but will be assigned to X on clearing session
from and to cancel flags are for cancelation before clearing session,
after cancelation obligation will be removed from Pool

types.name: ObligationPool
docs: Pool to keep obligations in one place,
has references to neighbour Pools

types.name: Participant
docs: Participant of system, can be Admin, User, Officer(Observer)

types.name: PoolManager
docs: Main account of Pools, have reference to Root Pool,
which is the main pool
